---
title: "Gravity and trade applications"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Gravity and trade applications}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

Count or flow outcomes can be estimated with the Poisson backend.

```{r, eval=FALSE}
m <- jwdid(trade ~ log_distance, bilateral_panel,
  ivar=pair_id, tvar=year, gvar=agreement_year,
  method="fepois", never=TRUE)
jwdid_event(m)
```

For continuous treatment intensity, supply `trtvar` and aggregate with
`asis=TRUE` to contrast observed intensity against zero.
